title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log into their account even after resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending in 1234 but the payment keeps failing.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city than the one entered.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately when opened on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving the 2FA code on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer receives an upload error when trying to update their profile image.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Not Working
description: Customer's subscription did not renew automatically despite auto-renew being enabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but did not receive the confirmation email.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Customer reports that the website loads very slowly during checkout.

title: Error While Updating Payment Method
description: Customer gets an error message when trying to update their saved payment method.

title: Duplicate Charges on Credit Card
description: Customer was charged twice for the same order on their credit card.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer tried resetting password but did not receive the reset link email.

title: Product Page Images Not Loading
description: Images on several product pages fail to load on the website.
